full_text:
Zeng Xuan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zeng Xuan. Controlled the north gate, opened it up to the attacking Wei forces. Zeng Xuan may not have existed in history. Zeng Xuan was affiliated with Zhuge Dan and the Wei Kingdom.
